hero.headline: Capsule pieces for real wardrobes.
hero.tagline: Natural fibres, honest prices, sizes XS–XL.

valueProposition.headline: We buy small batches so nothing sits in a warehouse for months.
valueProposition.body: Thread & Fold is built for people who want quality basics and a few statement pieces — without the markup of fast fashion.

howToOrder.heading: How to order
howToOrder.body: 1) Browse highlights below or our Instagram highlights. 2) DM with the item and size. 3) We confirm stock and ship within 48h (Tirana) or send tracking EU-wide.

about.whatWeSell: Linen shirts, wool coats, denim, and small-run accessories.
about.aboutUs: Two friends started Thread & Fold after years in retail buying — we only stock what we would wear ourselves.
about.physicalAddress: Rruga Ismail Qemali 8 (studio visits Fri–Sat by appointment)

featuredProducts.title: Merino crewneck — oat
featuredProducts.description: Mid-weight, machine wash cold. Unisex fit.

testimonials.quote: Quality is obvious when you touch the fabric. The memory game discount was a nice surprise!
testimonials.author: Elira K.

faq.question: How do I use my game code?
faq.answer: DM us on Instagram with the code from your win screen within 7 days.

faq.question: Do you ship outside Albania?
faq.answer: Yes — we ship to EU addresses with tracked post. Rates depend on weight.

text.title: Match the pastries — win a bakery treat
text.subtitle: Find every pair before time runs out. Wrong guesses cost you!
text.resultSubtitle: Show this screen or your code at pickup.

tapHearts.revealSubtitle: Code ROSE-HEARTS — free butter cookie with loaf

scratch.revealSubtitle: BOGO croissants Saturday — say ROSE-SCRATCH at the counter

memory.revealSubtitle: 8% off your next bread or pastry order — WhatsApp us this code before you pay.

hero.headline: Slow dough. Real butter. Same-day pickup in Tirana.
hero.tagline: Sourdough, viennoiserie, and celebration cakes by pre-order.

valueProposition.headline: We ferment 24–36 hours and bake in small batches.
valueProposition.body: Rose & Crumb is the bakery you message when you need something warm for breakfast or a cake that actually tastes homemade.

howToOrder.heading: How to order
howToOrder.body: 1) WhatsApp or Instagram DM with date & items. 2) We confirm pickup window. 3) Pay by link or at pickup.

about.whatWeSell: Country sourdough, butter croissants, seasonal tarts, custom cakes.
about.aboutUs: Opened in 2019 — our head baker trained in Lyon; our front-of-house is family-run.
about.physicalAddress: Rruga e Kafeterive 4 (side entrance, look for the bread lamp)

testimonials.quote: The viennoiserie rivals anything I had in Paris. Pre-ordering on WhatsApp is easy.
testimonials.author: Dorina M.

faq.question: Can I freeze the sourdough?
faq.answer: Yes — slice first, then freeze up to 2 months. Reheat from frozen at 180°C for 8 minutes.

hero.headline: Hand-set pieces. Quiet luxury.

valueProposition.headline: We source stones with paperwork you can trust.
valueProposition.body: Aurelia & Co. works with certified suppliers; every piece can be appraised and insured before you leave.

howToOrder.heading: Book a consult
howToOrder.body: 1) DM Instagram with what you are looking for. 2) We suggest stones within budget. 3) Deposit secures the piece; balance on delivery.

about.whatWeSell: Engagement rings, wedding bands, gold chains, and bespoke resets.
about.aboutUs: Founded by a gemologist and a goldsmith — one studio, no franchise markup.

featuredProducts.title: Signet ring — 14k gold

faq.question: Do you resize rings bought elsewhere?
faq.answer: Often yes — send photos and hallmarks by DM; we quote before you visit.

hero.headline: Quiet tailoring. Honest fabrics.
hero.tagline: Small-batch coats, knitwear, and trousers — Luna Outfits cuts for real wear.

valueProposition.headline: We buy cloth by the roll, not by the trend calendar.
valueProposition.body: Luna Outfits works with mills in Portugal and Italy; every piece is meant to last several winters.

howToOrder.heading: How to buy
howToOrder.body: 1) DM us with the piece and size. 2) We confirm stock from the studio rack. 3) Pick up in Shoreditch or we ship tracked UK-wide.

about.whatWeSell: Wool coats, merino knits, tailored trousers, leather belts.
about.aboutUs: Founded by a former Savile Row cutter — Luna Outfits is slow fashion without the lecture.

testimonials.quote: The coat fits like it was made for me — the wheel perk was the nudge I needed.
testimonials.author: James L.

hero.headline: Makeup with lab discipline.
hero.tagline: Skin-first bases, pigments that stay, and SPF you will actually wear.

valueProposition.headline: Every formula is patch-tested on sensitive panels.
valueProposition.body: Urban Glow publishes full INCI and % actives — no fragrance masking, no mineral oil fillers.

howToOrder.heading: Shipped from Los Angeles
howToOrder.body: 1) Cart online or DM for shade-matching advice. 2) We ship insulated when heat-sensitive. 3) Subscribe & save 12% on refills.

about.whatWeSell: Clean makeup, barrier creams, niacinamide serums, mineral SPF.
about.aboutUs: Founded by two cosmetic chemists after a decade in R&D — Urban Glow is direct-to-consumer only.

testimonials.quote: Finally an SPF that doesn’t sting around my eyes — and the tint reads like real skin.
testimonials.author: Ingrid M.

faq.question: Are products pregnancy-safe?
faq.answer: Check each label’s contraindications or DM our aesthetician with your trimester.
